championshipClue:
Finalists:
Alex

Blake

Casey

Drew

Only one of them won.

Timeline
3:55 PM — Principal posts a sheet on the bulletin board.

The sheet shows only the winner’s name.

4:02 PM — Alex walks past the board.

4:04 PM — Blake walks past the board.

4:06 PM — Casey walks past the board.

4:08 PM — Drew walks past the board.

Each finalist is alone when they pass.
You do not know who actually looked at the paper.

4:10 PM — All four finalists meet in the hallway.
You ask them all at once:

“Right now, do you know for sure who won the talent show?”

Their answers:

Alex: “Yes, I know for sure.”

Blake: “No, I don’t know.”

Casey: “I don’t know, but I know that Alex knows.”

Drew: “I didn’t know before, but after hearing Casey, now I know for sure who won.”

All four are answering honestly.
None of them have talked to anyone else.
None of them saw anyone else look at the board.

Who won the talent show?
